title: First-Contact Adapter Compression Closeout

issue_classifications.title: [Workspace]: Compress first-contact adapter surfaces into one ordinary startup path
issue_classifications.evidence: tools/AGENT_ROUTING.md and packages/planning/bootstrap/tools/AGENT_ROUTING.md are now short secondary generated adapters behind AGENTS.md, AGENT_QUICKSTART, start, and summary; renderer and tests keep the compressed shape.

findings.title: [Workspace]: Compress first-contact adapter surfaces into one ordinary startup path
findings.evidence: Root and package renderers now generate the compact routing adapter; maintainer and package tests assert the adapter is secondary and does not repeat preflight/report routing doctrine.
findings.notes: Dogfooding exposed that root checks and package doctor can diverge when bootstrap payload copies are not updated together; this is a useful input for #373.

validation_commands: uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
uv run ruff check src tests
cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py
cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .
